MAJOUMONOGATARI_STS2MODS_CECILY.title: Cecily
MAJOUMONOGATARI_STS2MODS_CECILY.descript: A half-witch born with a talent for manipulating tiny air currents. She was accidentally teleported into the Spire by a friend's experiment.
MAJOUMONOGATARI_STS2MODS_CECILY.cardsMod: Cecily cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
